scripts.test: npm run test:data && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:scripts: node --test test/scripts.test.cjs test/app-state-controller.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover -s test -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:assets && node scripts/run_tests_with_coverage.cjs && npm run test:ui && node scripts/v8_coverage_report.cjs && node scripts/check_coverage.cjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:hygiene && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:coverage
